command: systemctl stop mt5.service x11vnc.service xvfb.service 2>/dev/null && killall -9 terminal64.exe 2>/dev/null; wineserver -k 2>/dev/null; killall -9 Xvfb x11vnc 2>/dev/null; sleep 2 && rm -f /tmp/.X99-lock /tmp/.X11-unix/X99 2>/dev/null && systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl enable xvfb.service x11vnc.service mt5.service 2>&1 && systemctl start xvfb.service && sleep 2 && echo 'xvfb:' $(systemctl is-active xvfb.service) && systemctl start x11vnc.service && sleep 2 && echo 'x11vnc:' $(systemctl is-active x11vnc.service) && systemctl start mt5.service && sleep 20 && echo 'mt5:' $(systemctl is-active mt5.service) && echo '=== MT5 process ===' && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep && echo '=== Terminal log ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$TLOG" ]; then tail -15 "$TLOG" | tr -d '\0'; fi && echo '=== EA log ===' && for d in 20260227 20260226; do if [ -f "/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/$d.log" ]; then echo "$d:"; tail -20 "/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/$d.log" | tr -d '\0'; break; fi; done
